Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class OwnershipStructure

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.OwnershipStructure
public class OwnershipStructure extends Object
OwnershipStructure

Describes the legal entity structure of the alternative investment. Critical for tax treatment, regulatory compliance, and operational procedures.

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static OwnershipStructure of(String value)
      Returns a OwnershipStructure with the given value. For a specific value the returned object will always be a singleton so reference equality is satisfied when the values are the same.
      Parameters:
      value - value to be wrapped as OwnershipStructure
